title: lissochilus galbanus
intro: Lissochilus galbanus, also known as Yellow Water Lily or Galbanum, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it a sought-after treatment for various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lissochilus galbanus can be prepared as an herbal infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or as a decoction by boiling the roots in water, both of which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
